operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_psmgr_connect
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun peer_session_id () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun sess_session_id () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (concat  (select  sess_session_id (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  sess_session_id (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  sess_session_id (_ bv1 32) ) (select  sess_session_id (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  peer_session_id (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  peer_session_id (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  peer_session_id (_ bv1 32) ) (select  peer_session_id (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun peer_session_id () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun sess_session_id () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  false (=  (concat  (select  sess_session_id (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  sess_session_id (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  sess_session_id (_ bv1 32) ) (select  sess_session_id (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  peer_session_id (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  peer_session_id (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  peer_session_id (_ bv1 32) ) (select  peer_session_id (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_session.session_id is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
